entries.notes: Official-code Scalable Fingerprinting / Perinucleus Llama anchor reproduction. Not a Qwen final matrix.

requested_resources.environment_setup:
source ~/.bashrc
source /hpcstor6/scratch01/g/guanjie.lin001/venvs/zkrfa_py312/bin/activate
export HF_HOME=/hpcstor6/scratch01/g/guanjie.lin001/huggingface
export TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=/hpcstor6/scratch01/g/guanjie.lin001/huggingface
export HF_TOKEN="$(tr -d '\r\n' </hpcstor6/scratch01/g/guanjie.lin001/keys/hf_token)"
export WANDB_MODE=disabled
export TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false
python3 - <<'PY'
import importlib.util
import subprocess
import sys

requirements = []
for module, requirement in [
    ('wandb', 'wandb==0.17.4'),
    ('deepspeed', 'deepspeed==0.14.5'),
    ('lm_eval', 'lm_eval==0.4.3'),
    ('peft', 'peft==0.11.1'),
    ('yaml', 'PyYAML>=6.0'),
]:
    if importlib.util.find_spec(module) is None:
        requirements.append(requirement)
if importlib.util.find_spec('tinyBenchmarks') is None:
    requirements.append('git+https://github.com/felipemaiapolo/tinyBenchmarks')
if requirements:
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', *requirements])
PY
